title: AQL Sampling Risk & Cost Calculator
description: Calculates the total cost of quality risk and sampling inspection based on Acceptable Quality Level (AQL), lot size, inspection level, and defect cost parameters. Aligns with ISO 2859-1, Six Sigma, and Lean principles.

inputs.label: Lot Size (N)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of items in the inspection lot per ISO 2859-1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of items in the inspection lot per ISO 2859-1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 2859-1'e göre muayene partisindeki toplam ürün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Einheiten im Prüflos gemäß ISO 2859-1.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'articles dans le lot d'inspection selon ISO 2859-1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de artículos en el lote de inspección según ISO 2859-1.

inputs.label: AQL (%)
inputs.businessContext: Acceptable Quality Level – maximum percent defective that is considered acceptable as a process average.

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceptable Quality Level – maximum percent defective that is considered acceptable as a process average.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kabul Edilebilir Kalite Seviyesi – proses ortalaması olarak kabul edilebilir maksimum kusurlu yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Annehmbare Qualitätsgrenzlage – maximaler Prozentsatz fehlerhafter Einheiten, der als Prozessdurchschnitt noch akzeptabel ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de qualité acceptable – pourcentage maximal de défectueux considéré comme acceptable en moyenne de processus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de Calidad Aceptable – porcentaje máximo de defectuosos que se considera aceptable como promedio del proceso.

inputs.label: Inspection Level
inputs.businessContext: General or special inspection level per ISO 2859-1. Level II is normal.

businessContext_i18n.en: General or special inspection level per ISO 2859-1. Level II is normal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 2859-1'e göre genel veya özel muayene seviyesi. Seviye II normaldir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Allgemeines oder spezielles Prüfniveau gemäß ISO 2859-1. Stufe II ist normal.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau d'inspection général ou spécial selon ISO 2859-1. Le niveau II est normal.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de inspección general o especial según ISO 2859-1. El nivel II es normal.

inputs.label: Sampling Plan Type
inputs.businessContext: Switching rules for severity of sampling per ISO 2859-1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Switching rules for severity of sampling per ISO 2859-1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 2859-1'e göre numune alma şiddeti için geçiş kuralları.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umschaltregeln für die Schärfe der Stichprobenprüfung gemäß ISO 2859-1.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Règles de commutation pour la sévérité de l'échantillonnage selon ISO 2859-1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Reglas de cambio para la severidad del muestreo según ISO 2859-1.

inputs.label: Unit Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost per unit item (production or purchase cost).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per unit item (production or purchase cost).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim başına maliyet (üretim veya satın alma maliyeti).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût unitaire de l'article (coût de production ou d'achat).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo por unidad (costo de producción o compra).

inputs.label: Defect Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost incurred if a defective unit reaches the customer (rework, warranty, loss of goodwill).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost incurred if a defective unit reaches the customer (rework, warranty, loss of goodwill).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kusurlu bir birimin müşteriye ulaşması durumunda ortaya çıkan maliyet (yeniden işleme, garanti, iyi niyet kaybı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten, die entstehen, wenn eine fehlerhafte Einheit den Kunden erreicht (Nacharbeit, Garantie, Goodwill-Verlust).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût encouru si une unité défectueuse atteint le client (reprise, garantie, perte de clientèle).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo incurrido si una unidad defectuosa llega al cliente (reproceso, garantía, pérdida de buena voluntad).

inputs.label: Inspection Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost to inspect one unit (labor, equipment, overhead).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to inspect one unit (labor, equipment, overhead).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir birimi muayene etme maliyeti (işçilik, ekipman, genel giderler).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für die Prüfung einer Einheit (Arbeit, Ausrüstung, Gemeinkosten).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût pour inspecter une unité (main-d'œuvre, équipement, frais généraux).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de inspeccionar una unidad (mano de obra, equipo, gastos generales).

inputs.label: Actual Defect Rate (p)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated true defect rate in the lot (from historical data or process capability).

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated true defect rate in the lot (from historical data or process capability).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Partideki tahmini gerçek kusur oranı (geçmiş verilerden veya proses yeteneğinden).
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte wahre Fehlerrate im Los (aus historischen Daten oder Prozessfähigkeit).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de défauts réel estimé dans le lot (à partir de données historiques ou de la capabilité processus).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de defectos real estimada en el lote (a partir de datos históricos o capacidad del proceso).

rules.message: Lot size must be at least 2 and AQL between 0.01% and 10%.
Actual defect rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Valid inspection level and sampling plan type required.

thresholds.message: Actual defect rate exceeds 1.5x AQL – high risk of rejecting good lots or accepting bad lots.
Inspection cost per unit exceeds 50% of unit cost – consider reducing inspection or using alternative methods.
Sample size exceeds 20% of lot – consider switching to reduced inspection if justified.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
